title: Glassbox updates: fixing SR instability
summary:
I worked on Glassbox this week. The symbolic regression module had some instability issues. I fixed the division by zero in MetaLog and made MetaArithmetic fully differentiable. Now the model can finally find x^2 because I added even and odd symmetry to MetaPower.

Also did some cleanup. Fixed the NaN handling and indentation bugs in the evolution part. The pruning logic was slow so I changed the sensitivity analysis from O(N) to O(1). Added cooldown logic to RSPG to help with the search process. Still have to test more but it seems more stable now.
commitMessages: fix(sr): resolve instability and enable x^2 discovery
